source: Exhibit Q — RBI Consolidated Financial Statements Notes

note_families.summary: RBI is Canadian corp, sole GP of RBILP. 32,125 total restaurants worldwide, ~95% franchised. BK segment: 19,732 restaurants.
Fiscal year ends Dec 31. GAAP basis. Consolidation includes VIEs and marketing funds. Functional currency USD. Cash equivalents include credit card receivables <3 months.

Franchise royalties recognized as earned. Property revenue (lease income) recognized straight-line. Supply chain sales recognized at point of transfer. Advertising revenues recognized as services provided.
Straight-line method. Buildings up to 40 yrs, restaurant equipment up to 17 yrs, furniture/fixtures up to 10 yrs, manufacturing equipment up to 25 yrs. Software up to 5 yrs.

Lessor: operating leases recognize revenue straight-line. Sales-type and direct financing leases at net basis. Lessee: ROU asset and lease liability at inception using incremental borrowing rate. Finance leases depreciated straight-line. Net investment in property leased to franchisees $83M (2024).
2024: min lease payments $367M, variable $465M, subtotal $833M, plus direct financing $4M = total $837M. 2023: $851M. 2022: $813M.

Goodwill $5,986M. Brands are indefinite-lived intangible assets. Annual impairment testing Oct 1. No impairment in 2024, 2023, 2022. BK brand not specifically valued separately in these notes. FHS brand $816M — critical audit matter.

May 16, 2024: acquired remaining 85% of Carrols for $9.55/share ($543M cash). Step acquisition gain $79M. Assumed ~$431M debt (fully extinguished by Jun 30, 2024). Total consideration $648M. Funded with cash + $750M incremental Term Loan B.
2024 income tax expense $364M on pre-tax income $1,809M (effective rate ~20.1%). 2023: benefit of $265M. Deferred tax liabilities net $1,208M.
2024: $161M total share-based comp expense. Unrecognized cost $218M, weighted avg period 2.5 yrs. 2023 Plan permits stock options, time-vested RSUs, performance RSUs.
IT/telecom commitments $84M over 5 yrs. Advertising commitments $192M (mostly within 12 months). Equipment commitments $23M over 4 yrs. Letters of credit $24M.
6 segments: TH ($1,043M AOI), BK ($410M AOI), PLK ($243M AOI), FHS ($48M AOI), INTL ($614M AOI), RH ($44M AOI). Total AOI $2,402M. Long-lived assets: Canada $1,435M, US $2,684M, Other $52M = $4,171M.
2024: Net gains on disposal $(3M), litigation $0, FX gains $(71M), other $9M = net $(59M) income. Prior year 2023: $55M expense (includes software project write-off).
No material subsequent events specifically identified in notes read. Carrols acquisition finalized in 2024.
Marketing funds controlled by RBI are consolidated. Advertising revenues $1,187M in 2024. Advertising expenses and other services $1,330M.
